_comment: IMMUTABLE benchmark query set for retrieval query pipeline auto-research. 15 KG-derived queries (entities sourced from .knowledge_graph.json, top by mention_count) + 5 cold queries (no KG entity match expected). DO NOT MODIFY during the auto-research loop.
